About Me

When I was younger I thought myself very capable: "One day, when I have the time, I will build all these skills and see what effect I can have on the world."

Now, I think very low of what I can accomplish; I am slow and dull. I spend my days getting coffee with people, learning from others, and staying optimistic on a unfathomable future.

Where can you find me

Jake Ness

I am on a journey to learn about life. One day, I hope to gain understanding, to know for certain that I know nothing about life.
